sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 165 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on MA No. 1473/2024. (Condonation of Delay) 2. For orders on office objection No. 1, 4 & 28. 3. For order on CMA No. 1474/2024 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No. 1475/2024 (U/S 149) 5. For orders on CMA No. 1476/2024 (stay) 6. For hearing of main case. 15.10.2025 Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel identical references have been dismissed by this bench and one such instance is order dated 13.10.2025 passed in ITRA No. 152/2024. Learned counsel states that this reference may also be dismissed for the same reasons and upon same terms as recorded in the aforesaid order. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
